title: Hyundai Motor India Q4 PAT falls 22% to ₹1,256 crore, FY26 PAT at ₹5,432 crore down 4%, dividend at ₹21 a share
description: To support growth aspirations, the company has announced the expansion of its Pune facility by another 70,000 units post Phase-II expansion, taking the overall capacity to 1.14 million units by 2030.
